info.title: Plus Query API
info.description: İade gönderilerini listeleyen, gönderi hareketlerini irsaliye numarasına göre getiren, gönderi bilgilerini tarih veya barkoda göre getiren, gönderi teslimat problemlerini listeleyen API'dır. | This is the API that checks return order, tracks shipment by bill of landing id, get shipment informations by date or barcode, lists shipment delivery problems.

post.description: Belirtilen kriterlere ait iade gönderi listesini getirir. | Returns the return shipment list for the specified criteria.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"

get.summary: Track Shipment By Bill of Landing Id
get.description: İlgili irsaliye numarasına ait gönderi hareketlerini getirir. Eğer sipariş faturalaşmış ise bu bilgi elde edilebilir. | Returns the shipment movements of the relevant bill of landing id. If the order has been invoiced, this information can be obtained.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"

get.description: İlgili barkoda ait gönderi bilgilerini getirir. Eğer sipariş faturalaşmış ise bu bilgi elde edilebilir. | Returns the shipment information of the relevant barcode. If the order has been invoiced, this information can be obtained.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"

recipient.address: Hürriyet Mah. Ahmet Yesevi Cad. İkizler Sok.

post.description: Belirtilen kriterlere ait gönderi teslimat problemleri listesini getirir. | Returns the shipment delivery problems list for the specified criteria.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"

application/json.recipient_Name: ASTEK BİLGİSAYAR TEK DANIŞ EĞİTİM HİZM

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"

get.description: İlgili gönderi numaralarının bilgilerini getirir. | Returns the informations of the relevant shipment numbers.
get.summary: Get Shipments Status Info By ShipmentId(s)
